title: Legacy D-1/D-2/D-3 fixtures: migrate, remove, or keep? (issue #272)
context: The committed numeric fixtures teach the sequential id pattern. Issue #272 proposed migrating them to D-<ULID> or removing them. Surfaced to the user via AskUserQuestion.

options.label: Do nothing: no migration, no removal

rationale: User chose to keep the legacy fixtures untouched. The reject-sequential guarantee is enforced at creation time (assertContractDecisionId) so retained fixtures are fine and no repo-wide scan is used.
